concepts.title: SGD convergence analysis (convex and non-convex)
concepts.hook: Convergence rates; when does SGD work?

concepts.title: Adam convergence and limitations
concepts.hook: Adaptive learning rates; non-convergence in some settings.

concepts.title: Sharpness vs flatness of minima
concepts.hook: Flat minima generalize better; SAM (Sharpness-Aware Minimization).

concepts.title: Second-order optimization and Hessian-free methods
concepts.hook: Natural gradient, Newton methods; expensive but fewer iterations.

concepts.title: PAC learning framework
concepts.hook: Probably approximately correct; formal learning theory.

concepts.title: Implicit regularization of SGD
concepts.hook: SGD acts as regularizer; converges to minimum norm solution.
